hooks.command: cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && ruff check --fix $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null; ruff format $CLAUDE_FILE_PATHS 2>/dev/null; echo 'Formatted'

node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/(api_key|secret|password|token)\s*[:=]\s*['\"][^$]/i.test(i.tool_input?.content||'')){console.error('BLOCKED: Possible hardcoded secret detected');process.exit(2)}}catch{}})"

node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const cmd=i.tool_input?.command||'';if(/rm\s+-[a-z]*r[a-z]*f|rm\s+-[a-z]*f[a-z]*r/.test(cmd)){console.error('BLOCKED: rm -rf not allowed');process.exit(2)}}catch{}})"
cd $CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR && python -m pytest tests/ -v --tb=short 2>&1 | tail -20; echo '--- Tests run on stop ---'
